title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: A famous artist designed that sculpture.
example.secondSentence: That sculpture (1) _________ by a famous artist.

questions.firstSentence: I had my watch repaired at the jeweller's.
The soup was so hot that I couldn't eat it.
questions.secondSentence: It was (1) _________ that I couldn't eat it.

questions.firstSentence: She didn't start the new job because she was too scared.
questions.secondSentence: She wasn't brave (1) _________ the new job.

questions.firstSentence: He has been living in Canada since 2018.
Can you take care of the dog this weekend?
questions.secondSentence: Can you (1) _________ the dog this weekend?

questions.firstSentence: She told me, 'I am visiting my aunt tomorrow.'
questions.secondSentence: She (1) _________ visiting her aunt the next day.
